name: Cat Toy Fun Mix 4Asst 3pcs (Pa0141)
shortDescription: This cat ball is made of colorful hard plastic, with an enticing bell inside. It’s a fun toy for batting around, chasing, and hunting and it will encourage and stimulate your cat’s natural playful instinct.
description: The patterns of behaviors are similar and the things that entice cats to hunt also get them excited about toys. Keep your cat entertained for hours with this cat toys.
